title: Dark Jedi Master robe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Dark_Jedi_Master_robe_render.png|thumb|right|250px|A style of Dark Jedi Master robes common during the [[Sith Civil War]].]]
'''Dark Jedi Master robes''' were worn by those who had ascended the ranks of the Dark Jedi, those whose will and authority went unopposed in the era surrounding the [[Jedi Civil War|Jedi]] and [[Sith Civil War]]s. These black robes provided excellent protection while still offering the user full freedom of movement.

==Behind the scenes==
These robes look very similar to its lower counterpart, the Dark Jedi Knight Robe, but did have different mechanics like the Master robe offered a little more defense to the wearer than the Knight Robe did.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
